title: Everything is Copper
description: Some actual uses for copper. Adds a copper version of all the iron blocks and items.
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/73MCa9Po/images/cec1275442657cd046a097d5adeb60d38b9c457c.png)

Adds lots of stuff made of copper to offset the imbalance between iron and copper in 1.18+

Everything weathers and come in 4 variants, unaffected, exposed, weathered and oxidized.

If you still have copper left over, start eating it.

Stuffs added:

- Copper Golems
- Copper Doors
- Copper Trapdoors
- Copper Pressure Plates
- Copper Bars
- Copper Lanterns
- Copper Chains
- Copper Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings and Boots
- Copper Pickaxe, Axe, Hoe, Shovel, Shears and Swords
- Copper Horse Armor
- Copper Hoppers
- Copper Anvils
- Copper Rails
- Copper Ladders
- Copper Buttons
- Tarnished copper dungeon loot

Planned stuffs:

- Copper Cauldrons
- Copper Bucket
- Copper Minecarts (Normal, Furnace, TNT, Chest, Spawner and Command Boock)

If you have questions hop on over to the [discord server](https://discord.gg/KYPzaXBRrP)


[![Sponsor Time](https://jonn.dk/akliz_banner_productivebees.png)](https://www.akliz.net/lobstermods)
